steps.t: Svanr is in the First Hall of Nud-melek.
Svanr can be found outside of Moria, in the Dimrill Dale. You should speak with Svanr.
Mekhem-bizru can be found down the path from the East Gate of Moria.
Kheled-zâram is the great lake that lies on the Dimrill Dale. You should speak to a dwarf looking out upon Kheled-zâram.
The Mirrormere, also called Kheled-zâram, is the lake that lies against Mekhem-bizru in the Dimrill Dale. You should <rgb=#FF0000>look</rgb&g…
Svanr is in the Dimrill Dale. You should speak with Svanr.
